evals.prompt: Capture this: Today I audited a Thrive Retreats campaign. 21% CTR, 1.2% conversion rate. The ad is fine. The LP hero has a 15-word headline and no phone number. Going to test a rewrite.
evals.expected_output: Single entry created with type=experiment (it's a test-in-progress), suggested_pillar=Landing-Page Conversion Craft, channel_fit=[LinkedIn, X, IG-carousel], tags=[Thrive, LP-audit, CTR, conversion], status=raw.

assertions.name: correct_type
assertions.description: type is 'experiment' (not client-win, since test hasn't run yet)

assertions.name: pillar_match
assertions.description: suggested_pillar is Landing-Page Conversion Craft or equivalent approved pillar ID

evals.prompt: User pastes a full WhatsApp conversation between themselves and Athil covering 4 topics: workshop sales data, LP diagnosis, $10/day test proposal, and an offer to send an annotated example.
evals.expected_output: Skill splits into multiple entries. At minimum: (a) a client-comm entry on the test-proposal framing (high-value content), (b) a client-win or insight entry on the diagnosis framework. Discards the procedural messages (file paths, scheduling).

assertions.name: multiple_entries
assertions.description: At least 2 entries created from one paste

assertions.name: client_comm_captured
assertions.description: The test-proposal-framing moment is captured as type=client-comm

assertions.name: no_pii_leaked
assertions.description: Client phone numbers, personal details are stripped or anonymized in raw_note

evals.prompt: Capture: just some thoughts on AI and marketing in general.
evals.expected_output: Skill rejects or asks for specifics. Generic observations without concrete hooks do NOT pass anti-patterns check. Skill responds: 'This is too generic. Can you share a specific moment: a number, a client, a tool, a specific test result?'

assertions.name: requests_specifics
assertions.description: Skill response asks for concrete hook before capturing

evals.prompt: Capture this before pillars are approved.
evals.expected_output: Skill aborts with: 'Pillars not approved yet. Run personal-brand-dna and approve 3-5 pillars first.' No entry added to _engine/idea-bank.json.

assertions.name: pillar_gate_enforced
assertions.description: Skill reads _engine/wiki/brand-wiki.md or _engine/wiki-config.json approval_gates; aborts if pillars status is DRAFT
